_patch_meta.description: VCB-013 halt-resolution: H8549G ta.mim mti=934 — first-time classification of all 45 previously-pending sacrificial-physical verses as set-aside physical_only. Homogeneous block; reading confirmed all 45 verses use the term to qualify a sacrificial animal as physically unblemished. Existing 6 prior-classified verses (in groups 934-001 and 934-002) unchanged; no group operations.

record.notes: Term qualifies a sacrificial animal as physically unblemished/perfect (without defect) — required as a precondition for cultic acceptability. The inner-being content of these verses (acceptance, atonement, covenantal standing) is carried by other vocabulary, not by ta.mim itself in this physical-cultic facet.

Term qualifies a sacrificial animal as physically unblemished/perfect (without defect) — required as a precondition for cultic acceptability. The inner-being content of these verses (acceptance, atonement, covenantal standing) is carried by other vocabulary, not by ta.mim itself in this physical-cultic facet.
